title: lindernia oblonga
intro: Lindernia oblonga, also known as False Lipenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Lindernia oblonga include its potential to treat fever, headache, and respiratory infections, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its leaves and stems are harvested for their medicinal properties.
